{% extends "marketplace/vendor/base.html" %} {% load l10n %} {% block title %}{% if course|default:None %}Modifier le cours{% else %}Ajouter un cours{% endif %} - {{ vendor.company_name }}{% endblock %} {% block nav_courses %}active{% endblock %} {% block extra_vendor_css %} .vendor-form-shell { display:grid; grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1.35fr) minmax(340px,.82fr); gap:24px; } .vendor-form-card { background:#fff; border-radius:24px; padding:26px; box-shadow:0 16px 44px rgba(15,23,42,.08); border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.14); } .vendor-form-title { font-size:1.05rem; font-weight:800; color:#1e293b; margin-bottom:18px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; } .vendor-form-title i { color:#f59e0b; } .vendor-form-card .form-label { font-weight:700; color:#334155; font-size:.88rem; } .vendor-form-card .form-control, .vendor-form-card .form-select, .vendor-form-card .input-group-text { border-radius:12px; min-height:46px; } .vendor-form-card textarea.form-control { min-height:140px; } .vendor-form-card .form-control, .vendor-form-card .form-select { border:1.5px solid #fde68a; box-shadow:none; } .vendor-form-card .form-control:focus, .vendor-form-card .form-select:focus { border-color:#f59e0b; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(245,158,11,.14); } .vendor-side-stack { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:24px; } .switch-card { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff7ed,#fef3c7); border:1px solid #fde68a; border-radius:16px; padding:16px; } .preview-box { border:1.5px dashed #fcd34d; border-radius:16px; padding:14px; text-align:center; background:#fffaf0; } .preview-thumb { width:100%; aspect-ratio:16/9; object-fit:cover; border-radius:12px; margin-bottom:10px; background:#fffbeb; } .mini-note { font-size:.8rem; color:#64748b; } .form-actions { display:flex; gap:12px; flex-wrap:wrap; } .form-actions .btn { border-radius:999px; padding:12px 24px; font-weight:700; } .vendor-form-hero { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#111827,#7c3aed 55%,#38bdf8); color:#fff; border-radius:26px; padding:26px; margin-bottom:24px; box-shadow:0 18px 45px rgba(15,23,42,.20); } .vendor-form-hero h4 { font-weight:900; margin-bottom:8px; } .vendor-form-hero p { opacity:.84; margin:0; } .detail-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr)); gap:14px; } @media (max-width: 991.98px) { .vendor-form-shell { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .vendor-side-stack { order:-1; } } @media (max-width: 767.98px) { .vendor-form-card { padding:18px; border-radius:16px; } .detail-grid { grid-template-columns:1fr; } .form-actions { flex-direction:column-reverse; } .form-actions .btn { width:100%; justify-content:center; } .page-header-card .d-flex { flex-direction:column; align-items:flex-start !important; gap:12px; } } {% endblock %} {% block vendor_content %}
课程发布工作台

{% if course %}编辑课程{% else %}新增课程{% endif %}

返回课程列表
{% csrf_token %}
Informations du cours
{% if form_state.errors.title %}
{{ form_state.errors.title }}
{% endif %}
{% if form_state.errors.description %}
{{ form_state.errors.description }}
{% endif %}
{% if form_state.errors.price %}
{{ form_state.errors.price }}
{% endif %}
{% if form_state.errors.instructor %}
{{ form_state.errors.instructor }}
{% endif %}
Réglages du cours
{% if form_state.errors.category %}
{{ form_state.errors.category }}
{% endif %}
{% if form_state.errors.preview_url %}
{{ form_state.errors.preview_url }}
{% endif %}
Couverture
{% if course and course.image %}{% else %}
{% endif %} {% if form_state.errors.image %}
{{ form_state.errors.image }}
{% endif %}
Recommandé : format 16:9 pour un meilleur rendu desktop/mobile.
Publication
Annuler
{% endblock %}
